name: Lucile's Chicken Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fryer pieces with salt and red pepper.
2. Sprinkle chicken with 2 tablespoons flour. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, sauté chicken in enough oil to cover the bottom of the pan. Cook until golden brown. Transfer chicken to a large pot and drain oil from skillet, reserving drippings.
3. To the skillet, add about 5 tablespoons of reserved drippings and remaining 8 tablespoons of flour. Cook, stirring constantly over medium-low heat until roux is smooth and golden brown, about 20 minutes or longer. Be careful not to burn the roux!
4. Add garlic, onion, and cook until soft.
5. Add the cooked roux and onion to the chicken in the large pot.
6. Add green pepper, celery, and water to the large pot and simmer about 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
7. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste. Serve over hot rice.
